creator: knu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks! 

By the way, pseudo.grad.sccs.chukyo-u.ac.jp does not seem to be 
resolvable.  Would you please check if/to where the site has moved? 

Also, I heard that 1.3 had been released with the licence changed. 
I'd appreciate if you could check it out as well.  Thank you.
